metadata.title: Synthetic Aggregate Cohort Summary
metadata.purpose: Demonstrate descriptive aggregate table generation with disclosure controls.
metadata.population: Synthetic cohort only; no real persons or records.
metadata.disclosure_policy: Synthetic demonstration using an operational minimum cell size and complementary suppression.
metadata.human_review: A data steward and statistician must review any non-synthetic release.

intended_use: Research description only; not for patient care or live clinical use.
prohibited_uses: No diagnosis, treatment recommendation, dosing, triage, alarm, or autonomous decision.
No claim that suppression establishes de-identification or HIPAA compliance.
limitations: Cell thresholds do not address every linkage or differencing risk.
Descriptive differences do not establish causality or clinical importance.

governance.auditability: Retain aggregate provenance, disclosure settings, code version, and reviewer decisions.
governance.monitoring: Review new releases for differencing, rare combinations, and changed denominators.
